project: AI enabled artistic solutions for sustainable food systems
title: AI enabled artistic solutions for sustainable food systems

keywords.label: Keywords
keywords.text: agriculture, food, AI, digital arts, creative coding, sustainability, responsible innovation, ethics, green, care, health, systems design, experimentation, prototyping, usability, use-scenarios

abstract.label: Abstract
abstract.text: Hungry EcoCities puts forward a high-level alliance between science, technology, and the arts, to effectively explore how digital technologies & applications can lead in turn to reduced food waste, more sustainable value chains, eco-friendly attitudes, and a more ethical food consumption. Hungry EcoCities brings together some of the worlds most renowned art studios with leading AI and agricultural experts and a network of over 40 leading European agricultural companies to develop ways of creating a more healthy, sustainable, and affordable agri-food system for all.

team_members.label: Team members
team_members.text: Smrz Pavel, doc. RNDr., Ph.D. (DCGM) – research leader Bambusek Daniel, Ing. (DCGM) Otahalova Sylva (DCGM) Zemcik Pavel, prof. Dr. Ing., dr. h. c. (DCGM)
